exercises.header: Shall we go for a stroll at the beach?
I work out three times a week.
Where do you work out? Do you have a gym?
I go out with friends every weekend.
exercises.answer: Βγαίνω έξω με φίλους κάθε Σαββατοκύριακο.

exercises.header: Do you want to go out tonight?
I had a really good time last night!
exercises.answer: Πέρασα πολύ καλά χθες το βράδυ!

exercises.header: We always have a good time together.
I enjoy my coffee every morning.
exercises.answer: Απολαμβάνω τον καφέ μου κάθε πρωί.

exercises.header: I enjoy life with simple things.
exercises.answer: Απολαμβάνω τη ζωή με απλά πράγματα.

exercises.header: I rest in the afternoon after lunch.
exercises.answer: Ξεκουράζομαι το απόγευμα μετά το μεσημεριανό.

exercises.header: I need to rest, I am tired.
I listen to the radio in the morning.
I spend my free time with my family.
exercises.answer: Περνώ τον ελεύθερο χρόνο μου με την οικογένειά μου.
